e102.name: Tartrazine (E102)
e102.concern: Linked to hyperactivity in children; banned in some countries.

e110.name: Sunset Yellow (E110)
e110.concern: May cause hyperactivity; allergic reactions in some people.

e120.name: Cochineal / Carmine (E120)
e120.concern: Derived from insects; can trigger allergic reactions.

e122.name: Azorubine (E122)
e122.concern: Linked to hyperactivity; banned in several countries.

e123.name: Amaranth (E123)
e123.concern: Banned in the USA; suspected carcinogen.

e124.name: Ponceau 4R (E124)
e124.concern: Linked to hyperactivity; banned in USA and Norway.

e127.name: Erythrosine (E127)
e127.concern: High iodine content; may affect thyroid function.

e129.name: Allura Red (E129)
e129.concern: Linked to hyperactivity in sensitive children.

e151.name: Brilliant Black (E151)
e151.concern: Linked to hyperactivity; banned in some countries.

e155.name: Brown HT (E155)
e155.concern: Banned in several countries due to toxicity concerns.

e171.name: Titanium Dioxide (E171)
e171.concern: Classified as possibly carcinogenic (IARC Group 2B); banned in EU food.

e210.name: Benzoic Acid (E210)
e210.concern: May cause hyperactivity when combined with certain dyes.

e211.name: Sodium Benzoate (E211)
e211.concern: Can form benzene (carcinogen) when combined with vitamin C.

e220.name: Sulphur Dioxide (E220)
e220.concern: Can trigger asthma in sensitive individuals.

e250.name: Sodium Nitrite (E250)
e250.concern: Linked to colorectal cancer; forms carcinogenic nitrosamines.

e251.name: Sodium Nitrate (E251)
e251.concern: Can convert to nitrite in the body; potential cancer risk.

e321.name: BHT (E321)
e321.concern: Endocrine disruption concerns; restricted in some countries.

e421.name: Mannitol (E421)
e421.concern: May cause digestive discomfort in large amounts.

e450.name: Diphosphates (E450)
e450.concern: High phosphate intake may harm kidneys and bones.

e621.name: MSG (E621)
e621.concern: May cause symptoms in sensitive individuals (MSG sensitivity).

e951.name: Aspartame (E951)
e951.concern: Possible carcinogen per WHO; debated; avoid if phenylketonuric.

e954.name: Saccharin (E954)
e954.concern: Formerly listed as possible carcinogen; delisted but debated.

e955.name: Sucralose (E955)
e955.concern: May alter gut microbiome; some studies show DNA damage at high doses.

parabens.name: Parabens (methylparaben, propylparaben, etc.)
parabens.concern: Endocrine disruptors; found in breast cancer tissue.

propylparaben.name: Propylparaben
propylparaben.concern: Endocrine disruptor; restricted in EU cosmetics.

triclosan.name: Triclosan
triclosan.concern: Endocrine disruptor; banned in some hand soaps.

dibutyl phthalate.name: Dibutyl Phthalate (DBP)
dibutyl phthalate.concern: Endocrine disruptor; banned in EU cosmetics.

sodium lauryl sulfate.name: Sodium Lauryl Sulfate (SLS)
sodium lauryl sulfate.concern: Skin irritant; may disrupt barrier function.

oxybenzone.name: Oxybenzone (Benzophenone-3)
oxybenzone.concern: Endocrine disruptor; absorbed through skin; coral reef killer.

retinyl palmitate.name: Retinyl Palmitate
retinyl palmitate.concern: May accelerate skin tumor development when exposed to sunlight.

lead acetate.name: Lead Acetate
lead acetate.concern: Neurotoxin; carcinogen; banned in many regions.

talc.name: Talc
talc.concern: May be contaminated with asbestos; possible carcinogen.

petrolatum.name: Petrolatum (Petroleum Jelly)
petrolatum.concern: May be contaminated with polycyclic aromatics.

fragrance.name: Fragrance / Parfum
fragrance.concern: Undisclosed mix; common allergen and potential sensitizer.

alcohol denat.name: Alcohol Denat.
alcohol denat.concern: Can be drying; may disrupt skin barrier with overuse.

high_sugar.name: High Sugar
high_sugar.concern: Excess sugar contributes to obesity, diabetes, and heart disease.

high_salt.name: High Salt / Sodium
high_salt.concern: Excess sodium raises blood pressure and cardiovascular risk.

high_saturated_fat.name: High Saturated Fat
high_saturated_fat.concern: Raises LDL cholesterol; linked to cardiovascular disease.

ultra_processed.name: Ultra-Processed Food
ultra_processed.concern: NOVA Group 4; linked to cancer, obesity, and poor health outcomes.

trans_fat.name: Trans Fat
trans_fat.concern: Raises LDL, lowers HDL; strongly linked to heart disease. No safe level.

artificial_sweetener.name: Artificial Sweetener
artificial_sweetener.concern: May alter gut microbiome; health effects debated.

seed_oils.name: Seed Oils (Canola, Soybean, Sunflower, Corn)
seed_oils.concern: High in omega-6; may promote inflammation in excess.

msg.name: MSG / Monosodium Glutamate
msg.concern: May cause symptoms in sensitive individuals.

gluten.name: Gluten (Wheat, Barley, Rye)
gluten.concern: Harmful for celiac disease and gluten sensitivity.
